articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Alvin Jones (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Costa Rica 1, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Jeyland Mitchell (Costa Rica) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Francisco Calvo with a cross.
Goal! Costa Rica 2, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Warren Madrigal (Costa Rica) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Alejandro Bran.
Jeyland Mitchell (Costa Rica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Costa Rica 2, Trinidad and Tobago 0.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Noah Powder replaces Dante Sealy.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Darnell Hospedales replaces Rio Cardines.
Second Half begins Costa Rica 2, Trinidad and Tobago 0.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Fernán Faerron replaces Juan Vargas because of an injury.
Daniel Phillips (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Costa Rica 2, Trinidad and Tobago 1. Levi García (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Kevin Molino with a through ball following a fast break.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Steffen Yeates replaces Daniel Phillips.
Second yellow card to Alvin Jones (Trinidad and Tobago) for a bad foul.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Andy Rojas replaces Warren Madrigal.
Kevin Molino (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Nathaniel James replaces Levi García.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Andre Rampersad replaces Kevin Molino.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Kenneth Vargas replaces Josimar Alcócer.
Substitution, Costa Rica. Álvaro Zamora replaces Manfred Ugalde.
Andre Rampersad (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
